ValidationRule.description: To validate Insolvency Account Processing Status changes for internal and external users
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: ($Setup.Application_Config_Settings__c.Run_Insolvency_Status_Validations__c == True) && (ISNEW() || ISCHANGED(Insolvency_Status__c)) && (Not( (($Profile.Name == "System Administrator" || $Profile.Name == "CFG - Insolvency User") && ISPICKVAL(Insolvency_Status__c, "New") && ISNEW()) || (CONTAINS($Profile.Name,"Community User") && ISPICKVAL(Insolvency_Status__c, "PoC Details Provided") && ISNEW()) || (($Profile.Name == "System Administrator" || $Profile.Name == "CFG - Insolvency User") && ISPICKVAL(Insolvency_Status__c, "New") && ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Insolvency_Status__c),"For Owner Review")) || (($Profile.Name == "System Administrator" || $Profile.Name == "CFG - Insolvency User") && ISPICKVAL(Insolvency_Status__c, "Pre-Filing Review") && ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Insolvency_Status__c),"PoC Details Provided")) || (($Profile.Name == "System Administrator" || $Profile.Name == "CFG - Insolvency User") && ISPICKVAL(Insolvency_Status__c, "Pre-Filing Review") && ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Insolvency_Status__c),"PoC Package Generated")) || (($Profile.Name == "System Administrator" || $Profile.Name == "CFG - Insolvency User") && ISPICKVAL(Insolvency_Status__c, "Claim Filed") && ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Insolvency_Status__c),"PoC Package Generated")) || (($Profile.Name == "System Administrator" || $Profile.Name == "CFG - Insolvency User") && ISPICKVAL(Insolvency_Status__c, "Claim Established") && ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Insolvency_Status__c),"Claim Filed")) || (($Profile.Name == "System Administrator" || $Profile.Name == "CFG - Insolvency User") && ISPICKVAL(Insolvency_Status__c, "Pre-Filing Review") && ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Insolvency_Status__c),"Claim Filed")) || (($Profile.Name == "System Administrator" || $Profile.Name == "CFG - Insolvency User") && ISPICKVAL(Insolvency_Status__c, "Discharged") && ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Insolvency_Status__c),"Claim Established")) || (($Profile.Name == "System Administrator" || $Profile.Name == "CFG - Insolvency User") && ISPICKVAL(Insolvency_Status__c, "Purchase Pending") && ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Insolvency_Status__c),"Claim Established")) || (($Profile.Name == "System Administrator" || $Profile.Name == "CFG - Insolvency User") && ISPICKVAL(Insolvency_Status__c, "Claim Established") && ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Insolvency_Status__c),"Annulled")) || (($Profile.Name == "System Administrator" || $Profile.Name == "CFG - Insolvency User") && ISPICKVAL(Insolvency_Status__c, "Claim Established") && ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Insolvency_Status__c),"Discharged")) || (($Profile.Name == "System Administrator" || $Profile.Name == "CFG - Insolvency User") && ISPICKVAL(Insolvency_Status__c, "Claim Established") && ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Insolvency_Status__c),"Purchase Pending")) || (($Profile.Name == "System Administrator" || $Profile.Name == "CFG - Insolvency User") && ISPICKVAL(Insolvency_Status__c, "Claim Established") && ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Insolvency_Status__c),"Purchased")) || (($Profile.Name == "System Administrator" || $Profile.Name == "CFG - Insolvency User") && ISPICKVAL(Insolvency_Status__c, "Annulled") && !ISNEW()) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Invalid Insolvency Account Processing Status change
